source.name: Lab 3.2: Creating Your First Flow (goodbye.yml)
source.instructions:
Pass the following check:

Check 1: data/basics/goodbye.yml has the correct flow structure (flows:, goodbye:, name:, description:, steps: with utter_goodbye).
source.guidance: Ensure level1/data/basics/goodbye.yml has flows:, goodbye:, name:, description:, steps:, and - action: utter_goodbye. Use 2-space indentation.

sequence.feedback: data/basics/goodbye.yml has correct flow structure (flows:, goodbye:, name:, description:, steps: with utter_goodbye).
